title: hieracium ramosum subsp. orbolense
intro: Hieracium ramosum subsp. orbolense, also known as Orbolense Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to South America, particularly in the Andean region of Argentina, Chile, and Bolivia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Orbolense Hawkweed include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
